Wrong maturity bucket.

candidates.why: Clean current borrowings line on balance sheet; best match for short-term debt and preferable to maturity detail. Excludes lease liabilities because leases are shown separately.
Would capture current maturities if populated, but appears blank in preview and likely subsumed in Borrowings, current.

Potential component only; avoid if total current borrowings exists.
Supplemental maturity disclosure could overlap with Borrowings, current; avoid double counting when clean current borrowings total exists.

variables.notes: Chose the clean current borrowings total. Excluded lease liabilities, current, per STD rule.

candidates.why: Direct match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: This row sits immediately before investing cash flow lines and appears to be the operating cash flow total despite concatenated wording in the extracted label.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: The extracted row label appears concatenated with the next section header, but it is clearly the operating cash flow total and is the only suitable OANCF line.
